headlines.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
headlines.summary: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.

headlines.title: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
headlines.summary: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.

headlines.title: Three Iranian tankers exit U.S. blockade for first time in months as shipowners eye Hormuz in 'wary disbelief'
headlines.summary: At least three Iranian tankers carrying nearly five million barrels of crude oil have exited the U.S. Navy blockade.

headlines.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
headlines.summary: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.

headlines.title: Bill limiting investors from buying homes set to speed through Congress
headlines.summary: Top lawmakers reached an agreement on a key housing bill that would limit investor ownership, clearing the way for passage through both chambers of Congress.

headlines.title: Japan May exports grow at fastest pace in over three years, beating estimates, as chip demand soars
headlines.summary: Japan's exports in May grew at their fastest pace since November 2022, boosted by robust demand for cars and semiconductors.

headlines.title: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax appears on California ballots plunge on prediction markets
headlines.summary: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax is on California's ballot dropped after reports noted that Gov. Gavin Newsom is pushing to stop the proposal.

headlines.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
headlines.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.

headlines.title: SpaceX options list on Tuesday. Here's what to watch
headlines.summary: Will speculators approach SpaceX with the same vigor they've had for the major AI players of the past year?

headlines.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
headlines.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.

headlines.title: Wall Street's fear gauge tumbles as traders bid up SpaceX shares
headlines.summary: The biggest IPO has been digested without a hiccup, and Wall Street's  so-called "fear gauge" is back below its long-term average.

headlines.title: Oil tumbles on US-Iran deal framework: How one trader is playing the move

headlines.title: What have the U.S. and Iran agreed to? This is what markets are focused on.
headlines.summary: The Trump administration and Iran have agreed on a framework for a peace deal. As everyone waits for the text of the framework to get released, here is a rundown of what the key points are for markets.

headlines.title: America’s fertility rate has never been lower. Blame smartphones — and these 4 financial realities.
headlines.summary: Having as many children as families want requires “gender equality, economic stability, decent health and confidence in the future.”

headlines.title: Oil may move through the Strait of Hormuz first, leaving fertilizer supplies stranded
headlines.summary: The interim peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran seems to be doing little to answer some of the thornier questions about the Strait of Hormuz, including how much longer it will take for products other than crude to start moving through again.

headlines.title: Intel takes a major step toward turning around a business that’s bleeding cash
headlines.summary: Intel’s new manufacturing process has entered a stage that signals the company is confident in its ability to bring on external customers, analysts say.

headlines.title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
headlines.summary: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible.”

headlines.title: Chicken tenders are taking over the world, and KFC is rushing to keep up
headlines.summary: Goodbye bone-in wings, hello tenders and chicken sandwiches that can be easily eaten in the car.
